5 OR 67
4 OR 56
3 OR 45

Matched
0 OR 12
1 OR 23
2 OR 34
3 OR 45
4 OR 56
5 OR 67
6 I 7
7 I 0

Applying to 10011010
Input
I 0 = 1
I 1 = 0
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 1
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 1
I 7 = 0
Output
0 OR 12 = OR(I 1,I 2) = OR(0,0) = 0
1 OR 23 = OR(I 2,I 3) = OR(0,1) = 1
2 OR 34 = OR(I 3,I 4) = OR(1,1) = 1
3 OR 45 = OR(I 4,I 5) = OR(1,0) = 1
4 OR 56 = OR(I 5,I 6) = OR(0,1) = 1
5 OR 67 = OR(I 6,I 7) = OR(1,0) = 1
6 I 7 = 0
7 I 0 = 1

\boxed{01111101}
